holdings.infoBox: VO is an equity ETF with a total of 299 individual holdings. The top holdings are Seagate Technology Holdings stock at 1.90%, Western Digital at 1.78%, Vertiv Holdings Co at 1.17%, Quanta Services at 1.05%, and Howmet Aerospace at 1.02%.

overview.description: The Vanguard Mid-Cap ETF (VO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the CRSP US Mid Cap index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of mid-cap stocks in the US. VO was launched on Jan 26, 2004 and is issued by Vanguard.
